rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to raise a complaint directly.
The system shall end the process after a user raises a complaint.
The system shall allow users to authenticate their identity using an OTP.
The system shall allow multiple attempts for OTP authentication if the initial attempt fails.
The system shall enable users to view items based on different categories once they are successfully authenticated.
The system shall allow users to select items for purchase after viewing them.
The system shall provide users with the option to pay either through an online method or by cash on delivery.
The system shall deliver the product after the payment is completed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can raise a complaint directly.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A person can either raise a complaint directly or continue with authentication.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After raising a complaint, the process ends.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: they fill in the details and submit it, and it ends there.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can choose to authenticate their identity using an OTP.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose authentication, they verify their identity using an OTP.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows multiple attempts if the OTP does not match initially.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the OTP does not match, they try again.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once authenticated successfully, the user can view items based on different categories.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once it is correct, they can continue. After that, they can view items based on different categories and select what they need.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows users to select items for purchase.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, they can view items based on different categories and select what they need.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can choose between online payment methods or cash on delivery as a payment option.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once items are selected, they proceed to make a purchase and choose how to pay. They can pay either through an online method or by cash on delivery.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After the payment is completed, the product is delivered.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After the payment is completed, the product is delivered, and it ends.
